title: SentinelClient
description: The SentinelAC Client is a companion Fabric mod that works alongside the SentinelAC server plugin to provide enhanced cheat detection. It enables server-side verification of client integrity and instant detection of hack clients.
body:
The **SentinelAC Client** is a companion Fabric mod that works alongside the SentinelAC server plugin to provide enhanced cheat detection. It enables server-side verification of client integrity and instant detection of hack clients.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҡЎ INSTANT DETECTION в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Detects hack clients within seconds of joining в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ DEEP SCANNING в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Finds cheats even with hidden GUI в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SECURE COMMUNICATION в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Encrypted channel with server plugin в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

---

## вңЁ Features

### Deep Scanner

Detects hack clients even when their GUI is hidden:

| Detection Method | Description |
|-----------------|-------------|
| **Class Scanning** | Searches for hack client class signatures |
| **Mod Analysis** | Identifies blacklisted mods |
| **Keybind Detection** | Finds suspicious keybindings |
| **Thread Monitoring** | Detects hack client threads |
| **Reflection Scan** | Finds active hack instances |
| **Mixin Detection** | Identifies suspicious modifications |

### Screenshot Capture

- Server-requested POV screenshots
- Compressed transmission
- Chunk-based sending
- AI analysis on server

### Input Verification

- Mouse movement tracking
- Click pattern analysis
- Rotation verification
- Aimbot detection support

### Mod Scanner

Detects known hack clients:

```
вң— Wurst вң— Meteor вң— Impact
вң— Aristois вң— Future вң— LiquidBounce
вң— Sigma вң— Inertia вң— And more...
```

### Process Scanner

Identifies external cheat software running on the system.

---

## Installation

### Requirements

- Minecraft **1.20.4** or **1.21.x**
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) **0.15.0+**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

### Steps

```
1. Install Fabric Loader for your Minecraft version
2. Download Fabric API and place in /mods/
3. Download sentinel-client.jar and place in /mods/
4. Launch Minecraft
5. Join a server with SentinelAC plugin installed
```

---

## How It Works

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Client в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ Server в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ Action в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Joins в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Handshake в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Taken в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в–ј в–ј в–ј
Deep Scan Verify Mods Ban/Kick if
Initiated & Results Hacks Found
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в–ј в–ј в–ј
Results Sent AI Analysis Alert Staff
to Server Screenshot Log Event
```

### Connection Flow

1. **Join Server** вҶ’ Client connects to SentinelAC server
2. **Handshake** вҶ’ Client sends mod list to server
3. **Verification** вҶ’ Server checks for blacklisted mods
4. **Deep Scan** вҶ’ Client performs instant deep scan
5. **Results** вҶ’ Scan results sent to server
6. **Action** вҶ’ Server bans/kicks if hacks detected

---

## пёҸ Detection Capabilities

### Instant Detection (< 3 seconds)

| Hack Client | Detection Rate |
|-------------|----------------|
| Wurst | 100% |
| Meteor | 100% |
| Impact | 100% |
| LiquidBounce | 100% |
| Aristois | 100% |
| Future | 100% |

### Continuous Monitoring

- Periodic rescans every 30 seconds
- Input pattern analysis
- Screenshot requests from server
- Process monitoring
